basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: The Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) has officially announced the Recruitment 2026 with 1 Junior Research Fellow opening on a contractual basis. The detailed notification has been published on the official website https://www.manit.ac.in. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 30 years and holding a Post Graduation Degree in Basic Sciences or a Graduation Degree in Professional Courses (Any branch of Engineering) are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 01 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification PDF and walk-in details are shared

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation Degree in Basic Sciences OR Graduation Degree in Professional Courses (Any branch of Engineering)
qualification.details: Post Graduation Degree in Basic Sciences OR Graduation Degree in Professional Courses (Any branch of Engineering).

_labels.notification_pdf: Download MANIT Bhopal JRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download MANIT Bhopal JRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MANIT Bhopal JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the JRF position at MANIT Bhopal is scheduled for 01 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the JRF post at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the JRF post, candidates must possess a Post Graduation Degree in Basic Sciences or a Graduation Degree in Professional Courses (any branch of Engineering).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the JRF position is 30 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the JRF post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the MANIT Bhopal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JRF post involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. How should candidates apply for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly on the scheduled date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates if any, category certificate if applicable), and a duly filled application form if specified.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the venue for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The venue details are not explicitly provided in the extracted data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for the exact location and reporting time.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual job. The position of JRF is offered on a contractual basis.
